title: SpeedFrame– Car Art Pack
description: This mod adds a collection of ultra-high-quality car-themed paintings.
body: Bring the speed and elegance of real-world supercars into your Minecraft world with SpeedFrame. This mod adds a collection of ultra-high-quality car-themed paintings featuring iconic luxury and performance vehicles—from sleek Bugattis and Ferraris to modern Audis and classic Rolls-Royces. Perfect for decorating your garages, modern builds, man-caves, or automotive museums within Minecraft. Whether you're a car enthusiast or a builder looking for stylish wall art, AutoCanvas turns every base into a gallery of horsepower.
